title: gibbsReactor operation
description: Gibbs reactor: equilibrium composition from minimising the total Gibbs free energy subject to atom-balance constraints. Three selectable `model` paths: elementPotential (gas), reactiveFlash (multi-condensable, NRTL) and directMin (multi-start Nelder-Mead).

T.title: Operating temperature
T.description: Temperature at which the equilibrium is evaluated.

P.title: Operating pressure
P.description: Pressure at which the equilibrium is evaluated; enters the ideal-gas chemical potential mu = mu_pure(T) + RT ln(y_i P / 1 bar).

elements.title: Atomic elements
elements.description: Chemical elements for the atom-balance constraints (one per element). Each species lists its atom counts in this order.

species.title: Candidate species
species.description: Candidate species in the equilibrium mixture, each with its atom counts (one per element).

name.title: Component name (must be in the thermoPackage)
